hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
restaurant_name_set=set()
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity) in ['breakfast', 'lunch', 'dinner']: restaurant_name_set.add(activity_position(activity))
result=({"Left Courtyard Right Garden Fresh Beef Hot Pot (Suzhou Dayue Spring Breeze Store)"}&restaurant_name_set)
result_list.append(result)
total_cost=0 
for activity in allactivities(plan):
    total_cost+=activity_cost(activity)
    total_cost += innercity_transport_cost(activity_transports(activity))
result=(total_cost<=2000)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language:
1 person, from Beijing to Suzhou for 2 days, meeting any one of the following:
1. Hope to try one of these restaurants: Left Courtyard Right Garden Fresh Beef Hot Pot (Suzhou Dayue Spring Breeze Store)
2. Total budget for the trip is 2000.0
